title: Middleground Fabric 1.19+ Port
description: Options menus: OptiFine is cluttered. Sodium is out of place. Let's meet in the middle!
body:
# Options menus.

Port of [middleground](https://modrinth.com/mod/middleground) to Fabric 1.19+

OptiFine is cluttered. Sodium is out of place. Let's meet in the middle!

Featuring an All™ New™ menu style: now both cluttered *and* out of place!

Admire the style! The sheer beauty of the design!
![a beautiful example of the mod in action](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/kevinthegreat1/middleground/main/assets/demo0.png)
![another example of the stylish design](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/kevinthegreat1/middleground/main/assets/demo1.png)
